Container.Name: maxtube
Container.Overview: MaXTube is a self-hosted web UI for yt-dlp that lets you download videos, audio, captions and thumbnails from YouTube and hundreds of other sites. Fork of MeTube with extra features: paste a comma-separated list of URLs to queue multiple downloads at once, and play completed downloads in a built-in bottom media player without leaving the page.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port the MaXTube web interface listens on.

Config.Name: Downloads
Config.Description: Where downloaded files are saved. State files are stored in a .metube subdirectory here unless STATE_DIR is overridden.

Config.Name: Audio Downloads (optional)
Config.Description: Separate directory for audio-only downloads. Leave blank to use the main Downloads folder. Set AUDIO_DOWNLOAD_DIR to /downloads/audio if you map this path.

Config.Name: yt-dlp Options File (optional)
Config.Description: Mount a JSON file of global yt-dlp options here, then set YTDL_OPTIONS_FILE=/config/ytdl-options.json.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: UID of the user MaXTube runs as. Match to your Unraid nobody user (99) or a specific media user.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: GID of the group MaXTube runs as. 100 = users group on Unraid.

Config.Name: UMASK
Config.Description: Umask applied to created files.

Config.Name: MAX_CONCURRENT_DOWNLOADS
Config.Description: Maximum simultaneous downloads. Additional downloads queue until a slot is free.

Config.Name: DELETE_FILE_ON_TRASHCAN
Config.Description: Set to true to delete files from disk when trashed in the UI.

Config.Name: CLEAR_COMPLETED_AFTER
Config.Description: Seconds after which completed/failed entries are auto-removed from the list. 0 = disabled.

Config.Name: DEFAULT_OPTION_PLAYLIST_ITEM_LIMIT
Config.Description: Maximum playlist items to download. 0 = no limit.

Config.Name: AUDIO_DOWNLOAD_DIR
Config.Description: Path inside the container for audio-only downloads. Leave blank to use DOWNLOAD_DIR. Set to /downloads/audio if you mapped the Audio Downloads volume.

Config.Name: CUSTOM_DIRS
Config.Description: Show a folder dropdown next to the Download button so users can pick a subdirectory.

Config.Name: CREATE_CUSTOM_DIRS
Config.Description: Automatically create subdirectories that don't yet exist.

Config.Name: OUTPUT_TEMPLATE
Config.Description: yt-dlp output template for downloaded filenames.

Config.Name: YTDL_OPTIONS
Config.Description: Inline JSON of global yt-dlp options, e.g. {"writesubtitles":true,"subtitleslangs":["en"]}. See README for details.

Config.Name: YTDL_OPTIONS_FILE
Config.Description: Path inside the container to a JSON file of yt-dlp options. Mount the file and set this variable, e.g. /config/ytdl-options.json.

Config.Name: ALLOW_YTDL_OPTIONS_OVERRIDES
Config.Description: Expose a free-text yt-dlp options field in the UI per download. Enable only in trusted environments.

Config.Name: URL_PREFIX
Config.Description: Base path when hosting behind a reverse proxy, e.g. /maxtube/.

Config.Name: CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS
Config.Description: Comma-separated origins allowed to call the MaXTube API (required for browser extensions). Set to * to allow all.

Config.Name: DEFAULT_THEME
Config.Description: Default colour theme: auto, light, or dark.

Config.Name: LOGLEVEL
Config.Description: Log verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL, or NONE.
